description: This email template is perfect for small businesses in the tailoring industry looking to promote their services during seasonal events. It incorporates elements of family tradition and history, adding an emotional touch to the business narrative. The template is designed to celebrate the craftsmanship of tailoring, highlighting the creation of traditional suits. It's ideal for use on Small Business Saturday, a day dedicated to supporting local businesses. Furthermore, it's equipped with ecommerce features, enabling businesses to seamlessly integrate online shopping links and offers within the email. This template, part of the Business Services and E-commerce categories, is a great tactic to connect with customers, share your unique story, and drive sales.
short_description: Discover a unique email template designed for small business celebrations, perfect for family-owned tailor shops. This template showcases your suits and your craft's rich history. Ideal for Small Business Saturday events, it promotes local businesses while fostering emotional connections. A versatile blend of business services and seasonal promotion for any ecommerce platform.

designer.description: I am a Polish senior digital designer and email developer based in London UK. I am fully focused on creating beautiful, functional, and bulletproof emails and landing pages, designed with purpose and based on user experience.

html_data:
From the passion
of fashion

 
 

Everything starts with a little dream

New York Tyler's Tailor Shop is a place where tradition and quality is done by hand. Old Fashioned customer service and attention to detail will leave you looking your best. 

We offer everything from dry cleaning and alterations to personal lavish coat and up most exclusive Private label cloth coat and exclusives designer cloth coats boutique private label clothing designer. 

Come in and experience New York Tailor Shop the way tailor shops used to be over 100 years ago, just pure quality work. This is not a retail environment so there are no manic-driven sales people just top level skilled tailors servicing all of your custom clothing needs.

1958

Established in Galvin St.

By Jim Tayler Sr. 

1985

Takeover Company 

By Jim Tayler Jr. 

2015

Open New Location

By Jim Tayler the 3rd 

Read our story
 
 

Support Your Local Community & Help Us Celebrate Small Business Sunday

Old English
hunting style

Pure wool with interwoven herringbone pattern and interlocking Nari technique.

$199

Browse collection
 

Contemporary 
New Yorker

You can never go wrong by suiting up in a classy blue suit. A modern and timeless choice, team it with a crisp white shirt and brown shoes for a winning look.

$120

Browse collection
 

Don't take our word for it.
Hear what our customers say.
